title: Positive flow: Navigating through call logs
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the call logs screen. | Verify that the 'TODAY' and 'YESTERDAY' sections are displayed correctly. | Select a call log entry from the 'TODAY' section. | Verify that the detailed call log information is displayed, including the caller's name, phone number, location, time, and carrier. | Navigate back to the main call logs screen.
expected_result: The 'TODAY' and 'YESTERDAY' sections are correctly displayed. | The detailed call log information is displayed for the selected entry. | Navigating back to the main call logs screen works as expected.

title: Negative flow: Attempting to navigate to a non-existent section
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the call logs screen. | Attempt to navigate to a non-existent section, such as 'PREVIOUS DAY'. | Verify that the app does not crash or display an error message.
expected_result: The app does not crash or display an error message.

title: Boundary validation: Empty call logs
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the call logs screen. | Verify that the 'TODAY' and 'YESTERDAY' sections are empty. | Verify that the subtitle 'Advanced call log with location' is displayed correctly.
expected_result: The 'TODAY' and 'YESTERDAY' sections are empty. | The subtitle 'Advanced call log with location' is displayed correctly.

title: Usability: Testing the 'SKIP THIS' button
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the call logs screen. | Locate the 'SKIP THIS' button at the bottom of the screen. | Click the 'SKIP THIS' button. | Verify that the app navigates to the next screen or closes the tutorial.
expected_result: The app navigates to the next screen or closes the tutorial.

title: Accessibility: Testing screen reader functionality
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the call logs screen. | Use a screen reader to navigate through the screen. | Verify that all elements, including the 'TODAY' and 'YESTERDAY' sections, are accessible. | Verify that the 'SKIP THIS' button is accessible.
expected_result: All elements, including the 'TODAY' and 'YESTERDAY' sections, are accessible. | The 'SKIP THIS' button is accessible.
